description_long: This nightstand is crafted from dark, textured wood and features a slanted top surface adorned with rolled parchment, stacked books, and several lit candles. The front panel is decorated with an ornate carved motif, adding a touch of medieval or gothic style. The side panels are thick and robust, with visible bolts and curved cutouts, giving the piece a sturdy, handcrafted appearance. The books and scrolls on top suggest it is used for reading or writing, while the candles provide ambient lighting. The nightstand lacks drawers or visible storage compartments, focusing instead on its decorative and functional surface. The overall design is both practical and ornamental, suitable for a study, library, or themed urban setting.
description: A dark wooden nightstand with a slanted top, decorated with books, scrolls, candles, and ornate carvings. It has a robust, handcrafted look and no visible drawers.
description_view_0: Front view shows the slanted top with scrolls, books, and candles, as well as the ornate carved front panel.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the thick wooden side with curved cutouts and the stacked books and candles on top.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full carved motif on the back panel and the arrangement of books and candles.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the scrolls, books, and candles from another angle, emphasizing the side's structural details.
attribute_leg_design: thick wooden side supports with curved cutouts
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: against a wall or in a study/library corner
